---
title: "ANN"
output: html_document
---

# import data

```{r}
train <- readRDS("train_dummy.rds")
test <- readRDS("test_dummy.rds")

str(train)
str(test)
```

<<<<<<< HEAD
# model 
=======
# modeling
>>>>>>> 9a78ef6a036fa73ed3cc5f3dc5f36e3be084f6f5

```{r, cache=TRUE}
library(neuralnet)

ann_model <- neuralnet(
  formula = is_canceled ~ .,
<<<<<<< HEAD
  data = tele_train,
=======
  data = train,
>>>>>>> 9a78ef6a036fa73ed3cc5f3dc5f36e3be084f6f5
  hidden = c(5, 2),
  stepmax = 1e8,
  lifesign = "full")


<<<<<<< HEAD
#plot(ann_model)

#saveRDS(ann_model, file = "tele_ann.rds")
=======
plot(ann_model)

saveRDS(ann_model, file = "ann.rds")
>>>>>>> 9a78ef6a036fa73ed3cc5f3dc5f36e3be084f6f5
```
